Emperor '''Belgoa''' was a [[Trunsk]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the [[Emperor/Legends|emperor]] and nominal ruler of the planet [[Trunska]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] era. In reality, he was little more than an Imperial puppet. Although his people, the [[Trunsk]]s, were regarded as a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] species by the Empire, he did little to alleviate their suffering. While he publicly spoke out against the practice, he had a secret agreement with the local [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] allowing Imperials and other slavers to take Trunsks off-world. Belgoa was, however, allowed final say over which Trunsks would be taken. Belgoa ensured that his enemies were the first to be taken away.<ref name="Alien Encounters">''[[Alien Encounters]]''</ref> Under Belgoa's rule, the Trunsks were forbidden by Imperial law to carry personal weapons or to pilot armed starships. These laws were strictly enforced by Belgoa's [[Trunskan police force|police force]].<ref name="Alien Encounters" />
